title: Girls tackle the art of rugby
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby training...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby training has kicked off in earnest in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby training has kicked off in earnest in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"South Western Districts (SWD) Rugby representatives have been going to high schools and promoting the game of rugby among the girls.","html":"South Western Districts (SWD) Rugby representatives have been going to high schools and promoting the game of rugby among the girls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"D'Almeida Stadium","html":"D'Almeida Stadium"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Tuesday, 15 April, rugby practice took place at D'Almeida Stadium for girls from Sao Bras and Hillcrest high schools.","html":"On Tuesday, 15 April, rugby practice took place at D'Almeida Stadium for girls from Sao Bras and Hillcrest high schools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See a gallery here: https://tinyurl.com/yhemz98w","html":"See a gallery here: https://tinyurl.com/yhemz98w"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A good number of girls turned up for the training.","html":"A good number of girls turned up for the training."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Get to grips with the game","html":"Get to grips with the game"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The aim is for the youth to get to grips with the game, not just have a passing knowledge.","html":"The aim is for the youth to get to grips with the game, not just have a passing knowledge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coaching them were Sao Bras High School teacher Ariel Smith, who played rugby for the Stellenbosch women's team; SWD community coach Stanley Kama; and Mxolisi Taite Klas from Uitenhage, who is a former U20 Springbok and ex-teammate of Kama from Swallows in Uitenhage.","html":"Coaching them were Sao Bras High School teacher Ariel Smith, who played rugby for the Stellenbosch women's team; SWD community coach Stanley Kama; and Mxolisi Taite Klas from Uitenhage, who is a former U20 Springbok and ex-teammate of Kama from Swallows in Uitenhage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eastern Province","html":"Eastern Province"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Klaas also played in the U18 team for Eastern Province.","html":"Klaas also played in the U18 team for Eastern Province."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The girls learnt ball handling skills by doing a lot of passing and they were urged to keep eye contact with one another and communicate while throwing and catching.","html":"The girls learnt ball handling skills by doing a lot of passing and they were urged to keep eye contact with one another and communicate while throwing and catching."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The importance of communication between players on the field was impressed on them.","html":"The importance of communication between players on the field was impressed on them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]

images.alt: Girls tackle the art of rugby
